name: Hortensia SAGA
original_name: オルタンシア・サーガ
overview: Despite the constant threat of invasion by neighboring countries who covet Hortensia’s fertile lands, Hortensia has long managed to avoid the maelstrom of war thanks to its two main territories, the principalities of Olivier and Camelia, serving as its sword and shield. But on December 5, 767, Camelia suddenly rises in revolt against Hortensia...

trailers.title: Opening - LEADER by MY FIRST STORY [Subtitled]
